name: physim
description: Simulate Stormworks physics sensor outputs from a 3D gizmo, alongside LifeBoatAPI's microcontroller debugger.

physim.port.description: TCP port the extension listens on for the PhySim Lua client.

physim.autoOpenOnSimulate.description: Auto-open the panel when LifeBoatAPI Simulate (F6) starts.

enumDescriptions: Open the panel beside the active editor in the current window (default).
Open the panel in a new floating window (requires VSCode 1.85+).
physim.panel.openLocation.description: Where to place the Physics Sensor panel when it opens.

physim.channelOffset.description: Starting Stormworks input.getNumber channel that PhySim:injectAsInputs writes to (consumes 12 channels).

physim.autoInjectLibraryPath.description: Automatically add the bundled lua/ folder to lifeboatapi.stormworks.libs.libraryPaths for LifeBoatAPI workspaces.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run compile && npm run copy-three
